title: [InstCombine] Preserve range information for `Op0 -nsw umin(X, Op0) --> usub.sat(Op0, X)`

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8, i8) #0

define i8 @umin_nsw_sub_op1_rhs_neg_constant(i8 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define {{[^@]+}}@umin_nsw_sub_op1_rhs_neg_constant
; CHECK-SAME: (i8 [[Y:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = call i8 @llvm.usub.sat.i8(i8 [[Y]], i8 -13)
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[R]]
  %u = call i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8 %y, i8 -13)
  %r = sub nsw i8 %y, %u
  ret i8 %r
}
tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8, i8) #0

define i8 @umin_nsw_sub_op1_rhs_neg_constant(i8 %y) {
  %u = call i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8 %y, i8 -13)
  %r = sub nsw i8 %y, %u
  ret i8 %r
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8, i8) #0

define i8 @umin_nsw_sub_op1_rhs_nneg_constant(i8 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define {{[^@]+}}@umin_nsw_sub_op1_rhs_nneg_constant
; CHECK-SAME: (i8 [[Y:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = call i8 @llvm.usub.sat.i8(i8 [[Y]], i8 13)
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[R]]
  %u = call i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8 %y, i8 13)

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8, i8) #0

define i8 @umin_nsw_sub_op1_rhs_nneg_constant(i8 %y) {
  %u = call i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8 %y, i8 13)
  %r = sub nsw i8 %y, %u
  ret i8 %r

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8, i8) #0

define i8 @umin_sub_op0_use(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define {{[^@]+}}@umin_sub_op0_use
; CHECK-SAME: (i8 [[X:%.*]], i8 [[Y:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[U:%.*]] = call i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8 [[Y]], i8 [[X]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use8(i8 [[U]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = sub i8 [[U]], [[Y]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[R]]
  %u = call i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8 %y, i8 %x)
  call void @use8(i8 %u)
  %r = sub i8 %u, %y
  ret i8 %r
}
tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8, i8) #0

define i8 @umin_sub_op0_use(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
  %u = call i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8 %y, i8 %x)
  call void @use8(i8 %u)
  %r = sub i8 %u, %y
  ret i8 %r
}
